description: Group order=shuffle, seeded (in-memory only): proves the reshuffle actually randomizes member order. The first cycle plays in the initial weight order (mA, mB, mC) since no queue reset has happened yet; when the cycle is exhausted the group reshuffles via a seeded PHP shuffle(), and with seed=42 the second cycle comes out mC, mB, mA - a permutation that is not the weight/sequential order.
